title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, stream, and pull models via Ollama’s REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter giving Ollama models first-class support for chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-web)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama comparable to ChatGPT UI; folders, personas, code highlighting, RAG.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop client for Ollama; cross-platform GUI to chat and manage local models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with syntax highlighting and prompt history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & CUDA) plus docker-compose examples for Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset; use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that lets teams chat with Ollama models in threads and DMs without leaving Slack.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama as a tool for Claude Desktop and other MCP clients.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim wrapper for Ollama’s REST API with async HTTP and native feel.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for talking to Ollama; ideal for mobile/desktop apps needing local LLM power.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community-built Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to Ollama’s API.

title: ollama-go
summary: Idiomatic Go client for Ollama with context-based cancellation and structured streaming.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated Modelfile collection for running fine-tuned, code, and multilingual models in Ollama.
